title: I Don't Know (Community Enhanced)
original_ingredients: 7 small baking potatoes, peeled and sliced
1 (16 ounce) package frozen mixed vegetables, thawed
1 (10.75 ounce) can condensed cream of mushroom soup
original_instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). In a medium bowl, stir together the mixed vegetables and mushroom soup. Set aside.
Place the potatoes in a large saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then simmer over medium heat until tender, about 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, crumble the ground beef into a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until evenly browned, stirring to break up large lumps. Drain excess grease from the beef and place in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish. Pour the vegetable mixture over the beef, then arrange the potato slices over the vegetables. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle cheese over the top.
Bake uncovered for 25 minutes in the preheated oven, until cheese is melted and the dish is heated through and bubbly.
ingredients: 7 small baking potatoes, peeled and sliced
1 (16 ounce) package frozen mixed vegetables, thawed
2 boxes of scalloped potatoes, cheese sauce mix, and canned milk
chopped garlic, Italian seasoning, garlic and onion powder, and Worcestershire sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). In a medium bowl, stir together the mixed vegetables and mushroom soup. Set aside.
Place the potatoes in a large saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then simmer over medium heat until tender, about 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.

Meanwhile, crumble the ground beef into a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until evenly browned, stirring to break up large lumps. Drain excess grease from the beef and place in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish. Pour the vegetable mixture over the beef, then arrange the potato slices over the vegetables. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle cheese over the top.
Bake uncovered for 25 minutes in the preheated oven, until cheese is melted and the dish is heated through and bubbly.

source_review.text: I love this title!! Perfect casserole for hard working MOMS. I had2 boxes of scalloped potatoes and canned milk. I added the cheese sauce mix and the milk to make up for my lack of cream of mushroom soup. This was tasty and rib sticking. Thank You Kristen

source_review.text: I made this and it’s basically a deconstructed cottage pie. They called for a 9x13 pan but I used a9x9 and it was perfect. I also added chopped garlic, Italian seasoning, garlic and onion powder. The potatoes are vague. A large russet potato would work. Use a mandolin if you have one.Worcestershire sauce would be a great addition to the hamburger.

description: I would always ask my mom 'What's for dinner?' and the response would be 'I don't know.' I said I was going to make up a dish called 'I don't know' dish. It turned out pretty good. Ground beef, potatoes and cheese are layered with a few vegetables in this simple one dish meal.
